title: Nolana glutinosa
taxonomy: Nolana glutinosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. It belongs to the genus Nolana, which is a group of flowering plants native to South America. The genus Nolana is part of the Solanales order, which includes plants such as nightshades and morning glories. Within the Solanaceae family, Nolana glutinosa is a member of the Nolaneae tribe. This classification places Nolana glutinosa among the diverse group of plants commonly known as the potato family.
